response.justification: Meets minimum experience requirements (19+ years, BS in CS) and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals with entrepreneurial background. However, lacks the preferred AI/ML expertise that is central to this director-level AI strategy role. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (April 2025) does not demonstrate the deep, recognized AI expertise needed to advise customers and shape AI product strategy.
strengths: 19+ years of progressive software engineering experience with multiple staff-level roles demonstrating technical leadership across full stack
Proven ability to build and lead platforms and infrastructure projects (GISCollective, multiple company infrastructure roles) with genuine user impact
Entrepreneurial experience as GISCollective founder with demonstrated thought leadership through conference talks and technical workshops
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise despite role's AI strategy focus—current AI-agent work at re:cinq (since April 2025) insufficient for director-level AI innovation leadership
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field (stated as preferred), and no indication of formal AI/ML research, publications, or deep learning framework experience
Career pattern shows implementer-level contributions rather than strategic advisory expertise—current MCP code generator work suggests technical execution rather than platform strategy capability
